_comment: When Tiingo/Alpaca spread > warn_pct, log INFO and use 'authority_on_mismatch' source. When > halt_pct, alert CRITICAL via Telegram and block new entries for that ticker.

_change_log.reason: Alpaca IEX feed structurally stale for NYSE/NASDAQ mega-caps. Wave 1 flip in commit history was lost. NFLX confirmed $97 vs $107.79 (11.12%), AAPL $100 vs $107 (7%). Validated by B3 investigation.
